title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details - Cancel button
scenario: User taps Cancel (X) button on disconnected device details window and expects to return to the Find My Device map with connected devices list
steps: 1. Open the Find My Device app and ensure there is a disconnected/out-of-range device listed.
2. Tap on the disconnected/out-of-range device to view its details on the map.
3. Tap the Cancel (X) button on the details window.
expected: The details window should dismiss and the user should be returned to the Find My Device map showing the list of connected devices.
